text_block_list.text:
After I finish up my duties one day, I come across Fuji Kiseki speaking
with one of her young dormmates.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: This is strange. Why did you call me out here to this deserted place?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What's going on, my dear pony?

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text: Well, um, Fuji...

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text: Today I'm ready. I want to tell you how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Very well. I'm ready to listen. My heart is open.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text: Fuji, you... you mean the world to me!

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text:
You've always been there, just a year ahead of me, a goal for me to
chase and maybe one day even catch up to... And when I did...

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text: We'd be shoulder to shoulder, running as equals... running together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My dear, p—

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text: So... it's just so hard... that I...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now, now. Look at me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I heard from the director about this being your last day at the
academy... and about your injury.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even among the students here, you were gifted with a remarkable
talent. I knew you would become a formidable opponent one day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You were unwavering in your training, practicing harder than all
others. That's why it pains me to see you go.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I've always been a fan of yours.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to say...

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text:
I wanted so badly to keep running... to keep winning, and then one
day...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: One day?

text_block_list.name: Junior Student
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a big ask, but I want you to carry on my dream. My
dream as a racer...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'll hold it with me always. It'll be like we're running
together, forever and ever.

As the sun sets, a faint crying can be heard, until finally, the young
racer leaves with a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, it appears you've stumbled upon my secret. I know you're there,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There come times like that when a precious student must leave the
academy. It makes me feel so helpless, unable to change anything.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How can I bring joy to someone whose dream was shattered? Even her
parting smile was filled with sadness.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: She entrusted her dreams as a racer to me...

Just now, I'm reminded that Fuji Kiseki told me she once let go of her
dream to be on the big stage, choosing instead to become a racer...
choice_data_list: Hey, what's your dream? I mean now.
Hey, what's your dream? I mean now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Mine? My dream is crystal clear—it's to bring joy to all and make
miracles happen.

As soon as the words leave her lips, she falls silent. With a curious
expression, she looks deep in thought.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, I seem to have lost myself. Fuji Kiseki would put on a big
smile precisely at this moment!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you promise me you'll keep secret what you saw here today.
It'll be just between you and me, all right?

Clandestine promise made, Fuji Kiseki gives the biggest smile she can
muster.
